projects.title: Biosynthetic Production of Specialty Chemicals
projects.description: Participated in iGEM competition developing engineered bacteria for sustainable production of bioactive compounds. Contributed to mathematical modeling of metabolic pathways and experimental data interpretation.

projects.title: Bioremediation Using Engineered Microbes
projects.description: Worked on bioremediation strategies using genetically engineered bacteria. Involved in literature review, experimental planning, and analysis of microbial growth kinetics.
